title: Correctly handle errors in podman ps
body:
`podman ps` does not actually handle errors when retrieving containers right now. Fix that.

Also, I realized we never adjusted `--last` and `--latest` after we changed to boltdb (and removed the inherent sorting from SQL). I fixed --latest and disabled --last for now.

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 31d1f19 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 31d1f197f1a8dbcd5b66ad99cb42d2d27c36a030 -->
Alright, I forgot to skip the --last tests. I'm not sure how they were succeeding before now - maybe we weren't checking the output?
Yep, we were not actually checking the output for correctness, just that it was the right length.

:pushpin: Commit 772089e has been approved by `rhatdan`
